title: Utility Vacuums (Magnet)
description: Adds Vacuum items that act like magnet / magnetic charms that attract entity's (items/xp orbs)
body:
Are you bothered by not picking up the items and more you want to easily pick up?

Maybe you want to pick up items in a bigger circle? Maybe you have seen those item magnet charm mods That is what this pack does in datapack form. Not only for items but there is also ones for xp!

Even works with armorstand that hold it!

i suggest having bundle handy for storing and not activating If you want all ur items and xp to get to you quickly download this datapack! Shoutout noxon/kawamood for the help provided!
